advantages: One language (JavaScript/TypeScript) across frontend and backend.
Non-blocking event loop handles many concurrent I/O operations efficiently.
Huge npm ecosystem, including official provider SDKs.
Great for API services, streaming endpoints, and CLI tooling.
disadvantages: CPU-bound work blocks the single thread (needs workers/offloading).
ESM vs CommonJS interop can be confusing.
Callback/async pitfalls if not handled carefully.
Dependency sprawl and supply-chain risk in npm.
